text.title: Prompt Portability Across Providers Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from current prompt suite to validated portability-spec.

step.name: pick-providers
step.action: List ≥2 providers + concrete model strings + docs URL per provider.

step.name: audit-current
step.action: Tag each prompt for provider-specific constructs (Claude XML tags, OpenAI `developer` role, Gemini safety blocks).

step.name: pick-abstraction
step.action: Choose abstraction_layer: `tool_schema_only` (only tools differ), `system_prompt_only` (only roles differ), `tool_and_system` (both), `full_adapter` (also refusal style differs).

step.name: bind-refusal
step.action: Pin refusal_policy_ref to a versioned doc; ensure adapter has provider→refusal mapping.

step.name: audit-and-commit
step.action: Run validator; commit on green; bump version.
